title: Add isTokenExpired utility function
description: Create `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` in `src/auth/token-utils.ts` that decodes a JWT (without signature verification) and checks if the `exp` claim is in the past. Include co-located tests in `token-utils.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts:base64urlDecode - utility for decoding base64url encoded strings, should be reused for decoding JWT payload
src/utils/debounce.ts - single-function utility file pattern with named export
src/utils/debounce.test.ts - co-located vitest test file pattern
